steps.title: Use the style contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts realist accuracy about ordinary working people with romantic idealization through staged settings and flawless skin. The word instead signals that Keller's realist style opposed the romantic conventions.

steps.title: Reject aligned verbs
steps.content: Choice B would mean copied, Choice C would mean perfectly represented, and Choice D would mean continued or expanded. All three make realism align with romanticism, contradicting the contrast. The answer is A.
